Payments

ZEN Online payments ⤴︎

You can find the complete integration documentation by clicking on this link.

Integration credentials

You can find information on where to locate the integration credentials by following this link.

No
IPN secret
Checkout secret
Terminal API key
Terminal UUID
Payment terms & conditions
Yes

An example screenshot illustrating the information presented to the user regarding the acceptance of terms

We do not recommend to disable this option unless 'Payment and conditions' are included in the store's terms and conditions.

Payment terms and conditions

ZEN.COM account configuration

The following features are enabled by ZEN.COM based on your agreement. To make any changes, contact ZEN.COM support.

Enabled

Active for: Visa, Mastercard, BLIK, PayByZEN. Customers receive a portion of the transaction fee back after purchase.

Disabled

Not active for any payment method. An additional processing fee charged to the payer.
Payment methods

Select the methods to be available. You can also change the order in which they are displayed in your Shop. Zen does not recommend changes in this regard, and any deviations are made at Merchant's sole responsibility and may have a negative impact on conversions on the site.

PayByZEN
No results for this country.
The section is not available because, according to the current settings, payment methods will not be embedded in your service. The customer will be redirected to the zen payment gateway.
Failed to retrieve the list of available payment methods from the ZEN API. Please ensure that you have provided the correct parameters in the 'Integration Credentials' section.
Reset this country to default Reset all countries to default
Method of presenting payment channels in your Shop (redirected / embedded)

*If you choose to embed the widget in your service and/or integrate BLIK within your Shop, even though the first option indicates a "redirect" to the ZEN.COM checkout, all methods except for cards and/or BLIK will still be redirected. This is because the settings for cards and/or BLIK take priority over the global setting.

No

Choose whether the payment methods should be embedded in your service or if the customer should be redirected to the ZEN payment gateway.

Yes

Choose whether the customer’s card details should be entered through the ZEN widget embedded in the plugin during the purchase process, or if the customer should be redirected to the ZEN page to enter their card details and confirm the payment.

No

Choose whether the icons of payment groups should be displayed on the store front next to their names.

No

Choose whether the customer should be redirected to the BLIK service to enter the T6 code, or if the code should be entered directly on the Merchant's site.

Redirect page

If you don’t set a custom return page here, your Customers will be redirected to your default page after completing the purchase process.

Order status mapping

ZEN statuses are technical and are mapped to WooCommerce order statuses.

Order status right after placing order and before first ZEN IPN.

Data cache duration

The plugin fetches data from the ZEN.COM API on every checkout page load (available payment methods, cashback, authorization fee). Caching this data locally speeds up checkout and reduces the number of requests to the ZEN.COM server.

Clicking “Save changes” automatically clears the cached data.
Data refreshed.

Last refresh: today, 00:01

Use this if you have updated your ZEN.COM configuration and want the checkout to show the latest payment methods immediately, without waiting for the next scheduled refresh.

If you like WooCommerce please leave us a ★★★★★ rating. A huge thanks in advance!
